mapper.sql: SELECT m.mid_id, m.selection_id, m.report_content, m.file_id, f.original_name, m.status, m.inspector_id, ins.real_name AS inspector_name, m.inspect_comment, m.inspect_time, m.create_time, m.update_time, s.student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no, s.topic_id, t.topic_name, s.custom_topic_name, s.is_custom_topic, s.teacher_id, tea.real_name AS teacher_name, tea.teacher_no, s.campus_name, s.academic_year, s.status AS selection_status FROM project_mid_term m LEFT JOIN project_selection s ON m.selection_id = s.selection_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user stu ON s.student_id = stu.user_id AND stu.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_topic t ON s.topic_id = t.topic_id AND t.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user tea ON s.teacher_id = tea.user_id AND tea.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user ins ON m.inspector_id = ins.user_id AND ins.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN doc_file f ON m.file_id = f.file_id AND f.is_deleted = 0 WHERE 1=1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(m.mid_id) FROM project_mid_term m LEFT JOIN project_selection s ON m.selection_id = s.selection_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 WHERE 1=1 AND s.student_id = #{req.studentId} AND s.status = 'APPROVED'
